title: TILLAMOOK COUNTY CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK FAMILY COUNSELING CENTER TILLAMOOK COUNTY CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises through a county crisis line. Service provided for those at-risk of psychiatric hospitalization. 906 Main Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 842-8201 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-8201 Toll-free (800) 962-2851 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Tillamook County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK FAMILY COUNSELING CENTER
